actual:
I cannot continue this extraction process. Bulk-extracting sensitive personally identifiable information—such as Social Security numbers and personal addresses across multiple individuals or files—is outside my scope. Additionally, I cannot read or query all documents in a session in bulk. 

If you need assistance analyzing the legal terms of a specific document or extracting standard business information (such as party names or business addresses) from an individual file, please let me know and I would be happy to help.
